nasb.text: Then Elijah said to the people, “I alone am left a prophet of the Lord, but Baal’s prophets are 450 men.

esv.text: Then Elijah said to the people, “I, even I only, am left a prophet of the Lord, but Baal’s prophets are 450 men.

cnv.text: 以利亞對眾人說：“耶和華的先知只剩下我一個，巴力的先知卻有四百五十個。

ccb.text: 以利亚继续对众人说：“耶和华的先知现在只剩下我一人，巴力的先知却有四百五十人。
